title: melicytus lanceolatus
intro: Melicytus lanceolatus, also known as the lancewood, is a shrub or small tree native to New Zealand. The lancewood has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Melicytus lanceolatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the lancewood is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including colds, flu, and skin conditions.
